description: An outdoor photograph taken on the South Lawn of the White House. In the midground a man in a gray suit (identified in the tweet as Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons) stands on the grass being interviewed by a man in a blue suit who gestures with his hands, his back partly to the camera. Surrounding them is TV-interview equipment: camera tripods, a softbox/LED panel light, a teleprompter/monitor on a stand, and a hard equipment case on the ground; another person in pink stands at far left. In the background, the Washington Monument rises against a bright blue sky filled with large white cumulus clouds, with the lawn fountain, trees and shrubs. Visible in the right foreground is an out-of-focus broadcast camera. There is no overlaid text, slogan, headline, or designed graphic element on the image.
